docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACCAMO, JAMES J THOMAS JR, RAYMOND W SERVED AUG-22-2008, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT WESTBURNE SUPPLY, INC.
